主角人物性格塑造也非千篇一律，书中每位女主各有其性格，且并未夸张得一味迎合主角！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733800119,"group_id":"7382160730893585432","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxP3gbBAVjwJKJhfvJkIlf1KYlEbOBGccwGmqXWBgYCA","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1003177596684787","user_name":"爱吃桂花蟹的马善"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1003177596684787","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1799682032,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7382160730893585432","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越玄幻世界的楚歌，终于在十八年后觉醒了系统。
只是系统的名字，令他稍微有些绷不住。
反派写日记打卡签到系统？
什么缝合怪？
获得系统第一天，奖励灵体。
获得系统第七天，奖励王体。
获得系统三十天，奖励圣体。
随着楚歌不断书写日记，他的身边也开始发生变化。
多年后，面对着诸多气运之子，以及身旁婷婷袅袅的一众倾世女仙。
楚歌:“系统误我！我真不是曹贼啊！”
